sections.paragraph:
i.q. אֲרִי (with ־ֵה parag. as in אֵשׁ and אִשֶּׁה), and also of more frequent use, but only found in sing. a lion. Gen 49:9 Deu 33:22 Jud. 14:8 used of a powerful and fierce enemy, Isa 15:9 Jer 4:7 Isa 21:8, וַיִּקְרָא אַרְיֵה “and he cried as a lion;” compare Rev 10:3.

[(2) pr.n. Arieh 2Ki 15:25.]

אריה

Ch. id., Dan 7:4 pl. אַרְיָוָן Dan 6:8.
